content.heading: Welcome
content.text: Welcome to BarkinMad Studios. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the BarkinMad Studios website, located at https://www.barkinmad.studio, together with any content, services, applications, or information made available through it. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use this website.

content.heading: About Us
content.text: BarkinMad Studios is an independent software and game development studio based in the United Kingdom. This website provides information about our games, applications, software development services, company news, and other related content.

content.heading: Website Content
content.text: All information published on this website is provided for general informational purposes. While reasonable efforts are made to keep content accurate and up to date, BarkinMad Studios makes no warranties or representations regarding its completeness, accuracy, reliability, or availability. Content may be updated, modified, or removed at any time without prior notice.

content.heading: Intellectual Property
content.text: Unless otherwise stated, all content on this website—including text, graphics, logos, images, software, game assets, branding, and design elements—is owned by or licensed to BarkinMad Studios and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may view, download, and print content for personal, non-commercial use only. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, republish, or commercially exploit any website content without prior written permission.

content.heading: Applications and Software
content.text: Applications, games, and software products published by BarkinMad Studios may be subject to separate licences, platform agreements, store policies, or additional terms. Where applicable, those terms take precedence over these website Terms and Conditions.

content.heading: Third-Party Services and Links
content.text: This website may contain links to third-party websites, services, or platforms, including the Apple App Store, Google Play, Facebook, GitHub, Cloudflare, and other external services. BarkinMad Studios has no control over third-party websites and accepts no responsibility for their content, privacy practices, availability, or services. You access third-party websites at your own risk.

content.heading: Advertising
content.text: This website may display advertisements provided by third-party advertising partners. These providers may use cookies or similar technologies in accordance with our [Privacy Policy](/privacy) and [Cookie Policy](/cookies). BarkinMad Studios does not control the content of advertisements served by third-party advertising networks.

content.heading: Limitation of Liability
content.text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, BarkinMad Studios shall not be liable for any loss, damage, costs, or expenses arising from your use of this website, reliance on information published here, website interruptions, third-party links or services, or technical issues beyond our reasonable control. Nothing in these Terms and Conditions excludes or limits liability where it cannot legally be excluded.

content.heading: Privacy
content.text: Your use of this website is also governed by our [Privacy Policy](/privacy) and [Cookie Policy](/cookies).

content.heading: Changes to These Terms
content.text: These Terms and Conditions may be updated from time to time to reflect changes to the website, services, legal requirements, or business operations. Any updates will be published on this page with a revised Last Updated date. Continued use of the website after changes have been published constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms and Conditions.

content.heading: Contact Us
content.text: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us through the [Contact page](/contact).
